# CustomParser

> .NET / Unity library for named placeholders in localization and UI strings (`{player.gold_balance}`, `{weapons[0].name}`) resolved from game state via `IValueProvider` — alternative to positional `string.Format` for evolving templates.

## Start here

- [README](https://github.com/babarobat/custom-parser/blob/master/README.md): Problem (positional format drift), solution, `IValueProvider` API, Unity UPM install, build/test commands.
- [Specification](https://github.com/babarobat/custom-parser/blob/master/docs/SPEC.md): Syntax, path rules, `Parse`/`Render`, error policies, architecture.
- [FAQ](https://github.com/babarobat/custom-parser/blob/master/docs/FAQ.md): Common questions and search phrases (Unity localization, quest text, named format).

## Code samples

- [QuestDemo sample](https://github.com/babarobat/custom-parser/tree/master/samples/QuestDemo): Quest descriptions with `TemplateEngine`, `CompositeValueProvider`, quest/game providers.
- [Core API](https://github.com/babarobat/custom-parser/tree/master/src/CustomParser): `TemplateEngine`, lexer/parser, `IValueProvider`, `DictionaryValueProvider`.

## Unity package

- [UPM package README](https://github.com/babarobat/custom-parser/blob/master/Packages/com.babarobat.custom-parser/README.md): Git URL install (`com.babarobat.custom-parser`), DLL-only package, tag pinning.

## Install

- Unity UPM: `https://github.com/babarobat/custom-parser.git?path=Packages/com.babarobat.custom-parser#v1.0.3`
- .NET: project reference to `src/CustomParser/CustomParser.csproj` or NuGet-style pack (`PackageId` CustomParser).
